name: Rod of Alertness
description: This rod has the following properties.

alertness.effect: Advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks and Initiative rolls while holding

protective_aura.activation: Magic action to plant rod in ground
effects: +1 bonus to AC for you and allies
+1 bonus to saving throws for you and allies
Can sense location of any Invisible creature in Bright Light
protective_aura.duration: 10 minutes or until creature pulls rod from ground (Magic action)
